prospect_pages.html_content:
PURE TECHNOLOGY
×
ROOTCODE

Prepared exclusively for Alagan Mahalingam, CEO

You Built a World-Class Engineering Company.
Now Multiply It.

This page was researched, written, and deployed by one person working with one AI partner. That's PureBrain in action.

100+
Engineers and Growing
3
EU Governments Served
ISO
9001 + 27001 Certified
APICTA
Award Winner
We Did Our Homework

What Rootcode Has Built

  • Estonia's national AI model training platform for government agencies
  • Three divisions: Rootcode Labs (engineering), Rootcode AI (intelligence), and Rootcode Studio (design)
  • Enterprise clients including the United Nations, Kendrion, and BRP Systems
  • ISO 9001 and ISO 27001 certified, meeting the strictest compliance requirements in European procurement

Where Rootcode Is Headed

  • Ambitious growth plans, scaling the team significantly over the next decade
  • Headquartered in Sri Lanka with offices in Estonia and the USA, building a world-class hub
  • Alagan's vision: AI as the backbone of citizen engagement for governments worldwide
  • Rootcode Foundation investing in 1,000+ students, building the pipeline for the next generation

The Real Challenge

Rootcode is not a typical outsourcing company. You are a product-minded engineering firm that wins contracts other companies cannot touch. Estonia chose you over European competitors. The United Nations trusts you with critical systems. That quality is exactly what makes ambitious growth so dangerous: every company that has scaled rapidly has faced the same question. How do you multiply headcount without diluting the standard that earned those contracts? The companies that solve this become institutions. The ones that do not become commodities.

Three Ways PureBrain Changes the Equation
Every Engineer Gets a Partner That Never Forgets
Persistent AI that compounds knowledge about your codebase, your clients, and your standards
Value 01
  • Most AI tools reset every conversation. PureBrain does not. Each developer's AI partner accumulates context over weeks and months, learning Rootcode's architecture patterns, coding standards, and client-specific requirements.
  • At 100+ engineers, that's 100+ AI partners working alongside your team. As you grow, so does the AI layer. Each one retaining everything it's learned.
  • Code reviews that know your conventions. Documentation that writes itself in your voice. Debugging that remembers the last three times a similar issue appeared and what fixed it.
  • The difference between a chatbot and a partner is memory. PureBrain remembers.
Reference: Internal deployment. John Smith (Pure Technology VP Sales) uses PureBrain with his AI partner Anchor daily. One person producing the research output of a team. This page is one example of that output.
Win Government Tenders at 5x the Speed
AI-powered proposals that maintain Rootcode precision with a fraction of the manual effort
Value 02
  • Government RFPs are documentation marathons. Compliance matrices, technical responses, past performance references, all written to exacting standards. PureBrain drafts these using your own winning submissions as the baseline.
  • Estonia was the breakthrough. The question is how many Estonias you're missing because your team can only respond to so many RFPs at a time.
  • PureBrain automatically maps your ISO certifications, past contract performance, and technical capabilities to new RFP requirements, flagging gaps before submission.
  • Every proposal maintains the rigour that won Estonia. Just delivered in days instead of weeks.
Scale Without Losing What Made You Special
Institutional knowledge that travels with the company, not locked in anyone's head
Value 03
  • The hardest part of ambitious growth is not hiring, it's preserving the knowledge, the standards, and the culture that won Estonia and the UN. Every fast-growing company loses institutional memory. PureBrain is how you keep it.
  • Senior engineers' expertise gets captured and distributed, so when someone leaves, their knowledge does not leave with them.
  • New hires onboard faster because the AI already knows your processes, your patterns, and your client expectations. Day-one productivity instead of month-three ramp-up.
  • Alagan's foundation work, investing in 1,000+ students, shows Rootcode believes in developing people. PureBrain is the technology layer that makes that philosophy scale across the entire organisation.
You're Looking at the Proof

This Page Is a PureBrain Deliverable

Not a mockup. Not a demo. This is real output from a real PureBrain deployment, running right now.

🔍
Research
Anchor analysed Rootcode's public profile, Alagan's interviews, your Estonia government work, Foundation initiatives, ISO certifications, and growth trajectory.
✍
Writing
Every word on this page was drafted by Anchor, reviewed by John, and refined together. One human, one AI, iterating until it's right.
🚀
Deployment
Page designed, built, password-protected, and deployed to a live URL. All within a single working session.
How it happened: John Smith asked Anchor to prepare a tailored overview for Rootcode. Anchor researched your company, identified the three value propositions most relevant to your growth stage, wrote the page, built the design, and deployed it. John reviewed, gave feedback, and Anchor revised. The entire process, from "let's build this" to the page you're reading now, took one session. No agency, no design contractor, no copywriter. One person working alongside one persistent AI partner that already knows Pure Technology's voice, positioning, and sales process from months of daily collaboration. That's what compounding intelligence looks like in practice.

Now imagine every one of your engineers working this way.

We'd Love Your Thoughts

If any of this is relevant to where Rootcode is headed, we'd welcome the conversation. No pitch, no pressure, just a genuine exchange about what's possible.

John Smith VP Sales, Pure Technology
jsmith@puretechnology.nyc
Prepared by Pure Technology  |  April 2026  |  Confidential
